ItacPersonItem.Notes: Pupil of Giovanni Battista Aleotti. See Bernardi and Susa, Storia essenziale del teatro (2008), p. 218. He worked as stage designer in L` Emiona: Festa Teatrale (Padova: Paolo Frambotto, 1638).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
